codeReview.summary: Minimal, correct change. The worker updated only uv.lock, changing the ypricemagic git source from commit 587a4349 (v0.0.1.dev1428) to 298f6044 (v0.0.1.dev1429). No source code was modified, which matches the feature requirement ('Do NOT change any source code — only pyproject.toml (if needed) and uv.lock'). The diff is exactly 2 lines in uv.lock (version string and git commit hash). All 5 verification commands passed: uv lock, uv sync --extra dev, pytest (47 passed), mypy (clean), ruff (clean).

summary: Clean pass. The worker correctly used `uv lock --upgrade-package ypricemagic` to force re-resolution of the git dependency to the latest master commit. The change is scoped to exactly one file (uv.lock, 2 lines). All validators passed. The worker followed the backend-worker skill procedure, ran all required verification steps in the correct order, and produced a well-structured handoff. No issues, no gaps identified.
